Permit operations platform

Evidence-Driven Permit Intelligence

Transform fragmented permit records into structured evidence, reconstructed timelines, reviewer workflows, and professional review packets.

View Mission Control → Explore Sample Packet

Mission Control • Evidence Register • Timeline Reconstruction • Reviewer Workspace • Client Packet Generation

Evidence firstSource records stay connected to the work.

Human reviewedFindings and decisions remain reviewer-authored.

Deliverable readyOne canonical model drives packet outputs.

Platform workflow / 01–06

A traceable path from source record to agency follow-up.

Every stage keeps the investigation legible: what is known, what remains unresolved, who reviewed it, and what should happen next.

  1. 01

    Evidence Register

    Collect evidence

    Bring permit records, uploads, correspondence, and source notes into one case record.

    Open full evidence view ↗
  2. 02

    Source verification

    Verify sources

    Record provenance, distinguish source facts from assumptions, and surface gaps before analysis.

    Open full timeline view ↗
  3. 03

    Timeline Reconstruction

    Reconstruct the timeline

    Arrange material events in sequence and link each one to the evidence that supports it.

    Open full packet preview ↗
  4. 04

    Reviewer Workspace

    Review findings

    Separate evidence from open questions, reviewer findings, recommended actions, and approval decisions.

    Open full summary view ↗
  5. 05

    Client Packet Generation

    Generate the packet

    Render a consistent professional deliverable from the reviewed evidence, chronology, and findings.

    Open full dependency map ↗
  6. 06

    Action kit

    Prepare agency follow-up

    Package the cited evidence, open questions, dependencies, and next steps for the next professional conversation.

    Open full supporting evidence view ↗

Operational capabilities

Built for the investigation, not only the export.

01

Mission Control

Track the case, investigation health, evidence state, timeline coverage, and packet readiness from one workspace.

02

Evidence Register

Preserve sources, provenance, review status, and unresolved conditions.

03

Timeline Reconstruction

Rebuild what happened, when it happened, and which evidence supports each event.

04

Reviewer Workspace

Separate evidence gathering from findings, questions, recommended actions, and approval decisions.

05

Agency Dependency Map

Show which unresolved discipline, routing, or review dependency is blocking the next move.

06

Client Packet Generation

Generate preview, HTML, text, and PDF deliverables from one canonical presentation model.

07

Private Cloudflare Architecture

Use authenticated Workers, D1 case records, and private R2 evidence storage.

Authenticated Worker→D1 case record→Private R2 evidence

The output

The review packet is the deliverable. The workspace is the system that produces it.

Mission Control turns reviewed source material into a structured handoff without hiding the evidence, assumptions, open questions, or human decisions behind it.

  1. Mission Control
  2. Evidence review
  3. Timeline and findings
  4. Client-ready packet
Explore Sample Packet ↗

Workspace → deliverable

The work stays connected from investigation through presentation.

Trust and clarity

Evidence is organized. Judgment stays human.

PermitPulse organizes and presents reviewed records. It does not replace agency determinations or professional judgment.

01AI-assisted engineering and review support

02Deterministic client packet rendering

03Human verification and approval

Verified evidence
Source-backed records with provenance and review state.
Recorded assumptions
Interpretive context labeled separately from confirmed facts.
Open questions
Unresolved conditions kept visible for follow-up.
Reviewer-authored findings
Human conclusions, recommended actions, and approvals.
Generated deliverables
Consistent outputs rendered from reviewed case information.
